headline: How The Oshkosh (OSK) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Price Targets
summary: Oshkosh’s fair value target has been revised from US$172.67 to US$164.79, pointing to a modest reset in what analysts see as a reasonable price for the stock. That move comes as several firms reduce earlier, more optimistic targets, reflecting how they are weighing construction and rental equipment opportunities against execution risks and the timing of large projects. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets can help you track and interpret the evolving analyst narrative...

headline: How The Investment Story For Schindler Holding (SWX:SCHN) Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets
summary: Analysts recently reset their view on Schindler Holding around a revised price target of about CHF 318 to CHF 319, compared with a fair value estimate of CHF 302.17. This shift reflects a balance between more optimistic assumptions on the business and a cautious tilt in ratings, with several firms now sitting at Neutral in that CHF 318 to CHF 319 range. As you read on, you will see how these price targets fit into the broader, evolving narrative around expectations for Schindler. Analyst...
